public boolean checkSubarraySum(int[] nums, int k) {
    Map<Integer, Integer> memo = new HashMap<>();
    memo.put(0, -1);
    int currentSum = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) {
        currentSum += nums[i];
        int mod = (currentSum % k + k) % k; // to handle negative mod
        if (memo.containsKey(mod)) {
            int prevIndex = memo.get(mod);
            if (i - prevIndex >= 2) {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            memo.put(mod, i);
        }
    }
    return false;
}

class Solution {
    public boolean checkSubarraySum(int[] nums, int k) {
        Map<Integer, Integer> memo = new HashMap<>();
        memo.put(0, -1);
        int currentSum = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) {
            currentSum += nums[i];
            // Compute mod correctly to handle negative values
            int mod = (currentSum % k + k) % k;
            if (memo.containsKey(mod)) {
                int prevIndex = memo.get(mod);
                if (i - prevIndex >= 2) {
                    return true;
                }
            } else {
                memo.put(mod, i);
            }
        }
        return false;
    }
}
